Configuration for a Flask example application using Celery, specifying dependencies and build settings.

# Purpose
The file defines metadata and configuration for a Python project. Under the `[project]` section, it specifies the project name as `flask-example-celery`, version `1.0.0`, and provides a description and a path to the `README.md` file. It requires Python version 3.8 or higher and lists dependencies, including `flask` version 2.2.2 or higher and `celery` with `redis` support version 5.2.7 or higher. The `[build-system]` section indicates that the project requires `flit_core` version less than 4 and uses `flit_core.buildapi` as the build backend. The `[tool.flit.module]` section names the module as `task_app`. The `[tool.ruff]` section specifies the source directory as `src`.
